scope: Milestone 5 first pass of generic-low-level-search: make the cross-lane reduction primitive scheduler-emittable (was hand-kernel-only). Opt-in (WARP_REDUCE_LOWERING, default OFF). No model default change.
goal_context: The decode two-kernel attention tile + the warp GEMV are hand-written because the renderer cannot emit v_dot2 + cross-lane reduction + LDS. LDS+vector-loads are already native; this pass closes the cross-lane gap (the highest-leverage, since the warp GEMV is built on it and its other needs are native).

what_shipped.rule: extra/qk_warp_reduce_lowering.py: pm_warp_reduce auto-detects Ops.REDUCE over a single pow2(<=32) WARP/GROUP_REDUCE lane axis (ADD/MAX, float) -> staged ds_bpermute ladder
what_shipped.hook: tinygrad/codegen/__init__.py: pm_warp_reduce injected into the expander rewrite before pm_group_for_reduce, gated WARP_REDUCE_LOWERING + AMD; flag added to to_program cache key

evidence.structural: rewrite produces exactly log2(width) ds_bpermute shuffles; declines non-warp + non-pow2 axes

pipeline_e2e_gfx1100.driver: Tensor K=16 matvec -> GROUPTOP(16) single group reduce, WARP_REDUCE_LOWERING=1
pipeline_e2e_gfx1100.flag_off_unchanged: LDS-tree path byte-for-byte the default; matmul/reduce/elementwise sanity green

bugs_found_and_fixed: custom_kernel rejects the rewrite (open ranges leak) -> the rule must run in-pipeline where gpudims binds the lane (hence a codegen hook, not a kernel helper)

gated-store lane divergence: inline ds_bpermute pulled inside if(lidx0==0) -> garbage (max_err 6.7). Fixed by staging every shuffle into a REG (as warp_reduce_max does) so all ds_bpermute run unconditionally before the gated store
honest_status: FIRST PASS. Cross-lane reduction is now scheduler-emittable + correct, OPT-IN. NOT wired into the model, NOT default-on.
remaining_to_default_on_or_M6: mixed reduce (group + serial-K/group, the real GEMV K=4096) currently declines -> add the serial-then-ladder split
W==D compare a scheduler-generated GEMV using this lowering vs the owned warp GEMV under the byte-exact + W==D gate (Milestone 6); only then default-on / retire a hand kernel
if it graduates: move pm_warp_reduce + ladder into tinygrad/ proper (currently lazy-imported from extra/), add a renderer warp_size field, handle the non-gated-store case
v_dot2 remains the second renderer-lowering gap (for the attention tile); separate task
caveat: DNR arc lesson: exposing the instruction makes the primitive searchable (this milestone) but may not alone reach owned-kernel perf -- the schedule (waitcnt/clause/occupancy) is a separate deeper gap.
